description: All three ::new() constructors return Result<_, SecretError> where SecretError comes from secretx-core. What goes wrong: a caller who adds only secretx-signature to Cargo.toml cannot name the error type without also explicitly depending on secretx-core. This is a leaky abstraction — the public API of secretx-signature forces an undeclared transitive dependency. Fix: add pub use secretx_core::SecretError; (and SigningAlgorithm if algorithm() is part of the visible API contract) to secretx-signature's lib.rs.
title: SecretError not re-exported from secretx-signature
